profile.title: My Profile
profile.billingEmpty: No billing events yet. Completed Stripe checkouts will appear here.
profile.collectedEmpty: You have not collected any strategies yet. Open a strategy and tap Collect to save it here.
profile.accountHint: View how you signed in, reset your password, or sign out from this device.
profile.passwordNotRetrievable: Your password is stored securely and cannot be displayed. Use Reset password to set a new one.

profile.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.passwordOAuthOnly: This account uses Google sign-in — password reset is not available.
profile.passwordFailed: Could not update password. Try again.
profile.noPlan: You do not have an active plan.
profile.cancelHint: If you cancel, access continues until {date}.
profile.cancelConfirm: Cancel your plan? You will keep access until the end of the paid period.
profile.alreadyCancelled: Your plan is already set to cancel at period end.
profile.cancelFailed: Could not cancel. Try again or contact support.
profile.stripeSuccess: Payment received — your library access is active.
profile.paymentHint: Manage the card used for your library subscription.

legal.termsBody:
Welcome to Quant Buffet. By accessing this website, creating an account, or purchasing library access, you agree to these Terms of Use. Quant Buffet publishes educational summaries of quantitative trading research drawn from academic and practitioner sources. Nothing on this site constitutes investment advice, a solicitation to buy or sell securities, or a promise of future performance. Backtests, Sharpe ratios, and annualised returns are illustrative and may omit frictions, capacity constraints, survivorship bias, or regime shifts present in live trading.

You are responsible for your own compliance with applicable laws, exchange rules, and broker terms. Paid content is licensed for personal, non‑redistributable use unless we grant written permission. Do not scrape, resell, or mirror our articles, bots, or datasets. Accounts must use accurate contact details; you must safeguard credentials and notify us of suspected compromise.

Fees for library unlocks are disclosed at checkout. Except where required by law, payments are non‑refundable once content access is granted. We may suspend accounts that abuse bots, attempt unauthorized access, or interfere with site operation. Software is provided “as is”; we disclaim warranties and limit liability to the amount you paid us in the prior twelve months for the affected purchase.

We may update these terms or pricing with notice on this page. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. Governing law and venue will follow the jurisdiction stated in your checkout receipt or account profile. For questions, use the Contact page. If any clause is unenforceable, the remainder stays in effect.
legal.contactBody:
Quant Buffet helps systematic investors discover, compare, and study peer‑reviewed trading ideas without drowning in jargon. Our library links each strategy write‑up to its academic lineage, risk metrics, and implementation notes so you can decide what deserves a deeper dive. Whether you are exploring factor timing, seasonality, or cross‑asset trend models, we aim to save you hours of literature search.

Prefer a human? Reach our team on Telegram for quick questions about access, billing, or partnerships. For account, invoice, or privacy matters, email us and we will respond within two business days.

home.heroTitle:

library.title: Strategy library
library.subtitle: Filter by market, region, or asset class — each row opens the full strategy article.
library.planNote: Free strategies can be read in full without payment. Paid strategies require a one-time library unlock ($99) for 1 month — all languages included.
library.empty: Import your WordPress export here — seed includes one demo pair (EN/zh).
library.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, slug, region, market…

pricing.title: Unlock the full library
pricing.once: One-time unlock for 1 month — every paid strategy in English and Chinese
pricing.footnote: You will need a Stripe test key while developing locally.
pricing.signedInHint: You are logged in — checkout links this payment to your account.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.wechatHint: Wire WeChat web OAuth credentials to AUTH_WECHAT_* first.
auth.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errorEmailExists: That email is already registered — try signing in.
auth.errorRegisterFailed: Registration failed. Check your details and try again.

strategy.paywallBody: Purchase library access once or log in after paying to read the mathematics, rules, and trade lists.
strategy.collectError: Could not update collection. Try again.
strategy.collectSuccessBody: You can view this strategy anytime under My Profile → Collected Strategies.
strategy.aiPanelSub: Pick a question about this strategy — answers stay in plain language.
strategy.aiError: AI is temporarily unavailable. Add GEMINI_API_KEY or DEEPSEEK_API_KEY.
strategy.aiFallbackQ1: What is the main idea behind this strategy?
strategy.aiFallbackQ3: Who is this strategy best suited for?
